message.content:
@startuml
actor laboratory_coordinator as Actor

interface :LabCoordinatorUI as LabCoordinatorUI

interface :ValidateTestReportController as ValidateTestReportController

interface :Company as Company

interface rp : TestStore as TestStore

interface rp : Test as Test

interface rp : TestReportStore as TestReportStore

interface rp : TestReport as TestReport

interface :TestDiagnosis as TestDiagnosis

Actor -- LabCoordinatorUI : 1 asks to validate report and diagnosis

LabCoordinatorUI -- ValidateTestReportController : 2 createTestList()

ValidateTestReportController -- Company : 3 get = testReportsToValidate()

Company -- TestStore : 4 get = testReportsToValidate()

Company -- TestReportStore : 6 get = testReportsToValidate()

TestReportStore -- TestReport : 7 get = testReportList()

TestReport -- TestDiagnosis : 8 get = testDiagnosis()

LabCoordinatorUI ..> ValidateTestReportController : ref US15_SD_testReportsDTO.puml

ValidateTestReportController -- LabCoordinatorUI : 9 shows the available test reports and diagnosis and requests selection

Actor -- LabCoordinatorUI : 11 chooses all tests

LabCoordinatorUI -- ValidateTestReportController : 12 asks for confirmation

LabCoordinatorUI -- ValidateTestReportController : 13 confirms selection

ValidateTestReportController -- LabCoordinatorUI : 14 validateAllTestReport()

loop for each test report
    ValidateTestReportController -- TestStore : 15 validateTestReport(testId)
    TestStore -- TestReportStore : 16 setState(VALIDATED)
    TestStore -- Test : 17 registerValidationDate(date)
    TestStore -- TestReportStore : 18 setValidationDate(date)
end loop

LabCoordinatorUI -- Actor : 19 informs operation success

@enduml
